notes:
A selection fix release.

**Fixes & polish**

- **Selecting text across a tag or link no longer cancels the selection.** When
  you shift-select and your selection crosses a `#tag`, `[[link]]`, or block
  reference, it now keeps extending instead of collapsing to just that item.
  (Shift-clicking a link from a plain caret still opens it in the right sidebar,
  with no stray highlight — that behavior is unchanged.)

**Under the hood**

- The shift-click→sidebar selection-suppression (added in 0.3.32) now fires only
  on a fresh shift-click from a collapsed caret; while a selection is being
  extended it stays out of the way, so the text selection grows across inline
  atoms normally.
